---
title: "analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Nico og Ulrikke

```{r}
colnames(clean_data)
```

```{r}
filtered_data <- filter(cleaned_data, name == "LEU1")
View(filtered_data)


```

```{r}
# Convert the time series to a data frame
filtered_data_df <- as.data.frame(filtered_data)

# Now use ggplot with the converted data frame
ggplot(filtered_data_df, aes(rate, expression, color = nutrient)) +
  geom_point()
```
